description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional lounge with a chaise extension on the left side, upholstered in a rich, dark brown material. The lounge features three large, rectangular back cushions in a contrasting light gray color, providing both comfort and visual interest. The seat cushions are broad and flat, seamlessly integrated into the main structure, and the armrests are low and squared, matching the overall geometric design. The lounge sits on sleek, black metal sled legs that run parallel to the floor, giving it a contemporary, floating appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with minimal visible stitching or ornamentation, emphasizing a clean, minimalist aesthetic. This piece is well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern parks, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional lounge in dark brown with light gray back cushions and sleek black metal sled legs, featuring a chaise extension and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the lounge, the chaise on the left, and the arrangement of cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise section and the thickness of the armrest and seat.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the L-shape, cushion arrangement, and overall proportions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right armrest and the alignment of the back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions in light gray are evenly spaced along the backrest; seat cushions are integrated and continuous; chaise section has a single seat cushion.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest with no visible tufting or segmentation, supporting three loose cushions for added comfort.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; low, squared armrests at both ends, matching the lounge's geometric style.
attribute_leg_style: Sled-style legs made of black metal, rectangular in profile, running parallel to the floor and positioned at the ends for stability.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and minimal visible stitching; no patterns or tufting.
